---
title: "Project Title"
description: "A one-sentence hook: e.g., Reducing option pricing latency by 40% using C++. Optimization of X using Y, resulting in Z% efficiency gain."
date: 2025-02-05
categories: [Quant Finance, Python, Optimization] 
image: featured.png
image-alt: "Screenshot of the dashboard"
client: "Personal Project" 
github-repo: "https://github.com/yourname/repo"
body-class: "project-detail-view"
include-before-body:
  text: "<div style='margin-top: 50px;'></div>"
---

![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Python-3.10-3776AB?logo=python&logoColor=white)
![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Status-Completed-success)
[![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/badge/View_Source_Code-181717?logo=github&logoColor=white)](https://github.com/yourname/repo)

<style>
  #quarto-margin-sidebar {
    padding-top: 50px; 
  }
  .btn-launch {
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 12px 24px;
    background-color: #FF4B4B;
    color: white !important;
    text-decoration: none;
    font-weight: bold;
    border-radius: 5px;
    margin: 20px 0;
    transition: background-color 0.3s;
  }
  .btn-launch:hover {
    background-color: #E03E3E;
  }
</style>


## Overview
**The "So What":** Standard pricing models were too slow for high-frequency environments. This project implements a C++ accelerated pricer that handles 10,000 options/sec.

---

## 1. The Problem
**Context:** Briefly explain *why* this matters.  
*Example:* "Standard Monte Carlo simulations are too slow for real-time pricing..."

## 2. The Solution
**Approach:** High-level summary of your strategy.
* **Metric:** What did you optimize? (Speed, Accuracy, Sharpe Ratio)
* **Tech Stack:** Python (NumPy, Pandas), C++, Docker.

## 3. Technical Implementation

::: {.callout-note}
### Key Algorithm: Vectorization
By replacing the `for` loop with NumPy vectorization, we reduced execution time from 40s to 0.2s.
:::

# python code here #

## 4. Results
* **Performance:** 50x speedup.
* **Impact:** Enables real-time strategy backtesting.

[View Source Code on GitHub &rarr;](https://github.com/yourname/repo){.btn .btn-primary}
